review_text: What a lovely park, walking distance to everything! Very friendly and helpful staff. Would 100% recommend.
The unit had everything I needed, was neat and tidy and the customer service was first rate. Perfect location too. I’ll be back!

We stayed at BIG4 Aireys Inlet Holiday Park on May 17th and checked out on May 18th. While the overall stay was decent, the experience on the morning of checkout left a very sour impression.

At around 10:30 am, a lady staff member came knocking on our door saying the checkout time is at 10:00 am. I politely explained that during check-in, we were informed that the checkout could be done between 11:00–11:30 am. Instead of calmly clarifying the misunderstanding, she rather rudely told us to vacate by 11:00 am and responded with a deep sigh, which came across as quite disrespectful.

The concern here is not about the checkout timing itself, but the manner in which the situation was handled. A simple polite conversation or even a quick phone call would have been far more professional. In the hospitality industry, guests should be treated with courtesy and respect at all times. We paid for the service and expected a much more respectful approach from the staff.

Never coming back or recommending anybody to book this holiday park.

The adds for this place had nothing to do with the reality of it. Sites were near impossible to back into we didnt enjoy it   And it’s $10 extra for your pet   Because people don’t pick up after them well we do
Friendly check-in,  clean rooms, has everything you need. Excellent location for walks, to restaurants close by walking distance

Loved this location along the GOR and wished we had of known about it earlier. The caravan park itself is lovely and great amenities. Very helpful staff and super location. The pub next door has excellent meals and we’re quite large. Would definitely stay here again.
Super friendly staff facilities were clean and grounds were tidy.

Our Surfcoast Boogie Boarders group stayed for two nights and absolutely loved it. Aireys Inlet Big 4 is such a lovely, relaxing, intimate caravan park with plenty of space for everyone. Waking up to birds chirping each morning was beautiful. The location is perfect — so many great beaches and local spots within easy walking distance. The staff were friendly, professional and made everything feel relaxed and welcoming. Highly recommend for a peaceful coastal getaway

We love this caravan park in Aireys. This is our 4th stay, usually cabin stay and its always spotless. Great access to walks, beach, cafes, restaurants etc.
Our fur baby also loves it 🙂 cant wait to book another stay real soon. Highly recommend this park
Bathrooms immaculate.   Was very happy there.   Close to everything and had a great time

Such a beautiful little camping ground, in a great location — walking distance to nature, cafe, restaurant, general store.

Accommodation options are great, and very well priced, and all the facilities available were clean, and easily accessed from every site.
Lovely place very clean great location, friendly lovely staff, we will come back.

I checked into one of the bark huts after two days walking from Torquay. I am so glad I took this option instead of another night of camping in my tent.
From the friendly and informative staff on arrival, to the spotlessly clean and fabuously stocked cabin, I cant find fault with this park.
It is obvious from the great condition of all the park facilities that the owners take great pride in their business. It even has a communal fire pit!
The proximity to the local top shops was my favourite feature however. A great general store and bottle shop, along with a couple of restaurants and cafe a 2 minute walk across the road was the perfect distance after a couple of days walking.
Thank you for a fabulous stay.
Excellent customer service.  Staff were understanding of our u usual requirements.

I was charged almost 200 dollars almost 6 months after I was meant to be charged. This was an issue on big4s end and they should have ensured the money went through on the day or shortly after. I spoke with Colen about receiving a partial refund and was not given any such option. This is extremely disingenuous and please do not stay with these scam artists!

Cool place / love location and amazing pasta place across the road …. People should go there more often.
Accom great I was in the wooden triangle villas .
Was some work being done on site , but need I think in general a basketball court / up grade trampoline area / replace go karts with something else . You attraction is families .
Needs more .

But my son loves staying there.

Not sure if 3rd year will return .

We had a fun and cosy stay in the Safari Tent. My 4 year-old loved every minute. It's a small park, but has everything the kids need and a comfortable and relaxing stay for adults. Cafe, shops, beach, pub all in walking distance. We'll be back.

We love the high standards of a BIG4 Holiday Park.  This time we decided to visit the BIG4 Aireys Inlet over the 2026 Moomba long weekend, for a family reunion, where we booked multiple cabins.  It was a disappointing experience.  Our cabin's air conditioning unit wasn't working, and we were told there was no maintenance available for the entire weekend.  For the price we paid, a ceiling fan wasn't an acceptable substitute.  To make matters worse, our cabin had a noticeable insect issue, with all areas infested by spiders.  When reported, we were simply given a can of insect spray and advised that pest control regularly attends the Park, but clearly our cabin was missed.  Customer service was poor.  We were offered a 15% refund, which did not reflect the uncomfortable stay we experienced, and our follow-up email was ignored.  Overall, not the usual high standard we expected, compared to others, from a BIG4 Holiday Park 🙁
Stayed a night in our van. Friendly staff spacious sites with a clean and well maintained campground. Amenities were awesome, had the best shower since we left home.

This park offers such a perfect space for a family travelling the Great Ocean Road. With plenty of entertainment for the kids, convenience being walkable distance to shops and restaurants and extremely friendly and helpful staff it’s one I’d recommend.

We had a brilliant stay at BIG4 Aireys Inlet. The glamping tent was such a fun and unique experience, and the park itself is in such a beautiful location and very well maintained. The amenities were great, and the hosts were incredibly friendly and accommodating.

We had such a great time and would definitely stay again - highly recommend!

We enjoyed a lovely stay. Staff very welcoming and helpful. Great location. Beach, cafes, shops and Aireys Pub all within easy walking distance. Short drive to walking trails. The cabin we stayed in was clean and comfortable. We did have an issue with the TV which was not working. Staff tried their best to assist and replaced TV with a newer one so we could at least watch the pre-loaded free movies. The technician arrived on the last afternoon of our stay and he was able to rectify the issue quickly. Apart from this minor inconvenience we thoroughly enjoyed our stay and will definitely be back. Would not hesitate in recommending 💟
great location friendly staff clean room well maintained property
Lovely little park. Dog friendly cabins! More caravan parks should offer this option. Highly recommend

So, we were travelling as mum and dad (1 pitch) and 2 grown up boys and their partners (2 further pitches) and our family doggo. A bit of a palaver to book as I was booking 3 pitches with differing leaving dates, but was accommodated without any issues. A nice clean site with differing accommodation options (we were on a unpowered tent site). The communal fire pit was really nice and we thoroughly enjoyed chatting over a beer and a fire with fellow campers from different parts of the state. The toilet/shower block is by far the cleanest we have ever seen over the years (6 stars for that!!).
The only small gripe (and gripe is too strong a word) is that we couldn't have a fire/firepit at our site, but can understand as there were over hanging trees, however, it didn't distract from our stay, just would've been nice.
Thanks Big4 Airey's Inlet, loved our short break post lockdown!!

Stayed in an ensuite site with our spoodle. Very good ensuite with a decent sized vanity to put things. Also clean with a good shower. The lady who booked us in recommended A La Grecque for dinner which was superb. Highly recommended also.

Great location, walking distance to pub, shops and restaurants/cafes. We stayed for the Aireys Inlet Music Festival and it was an easy walk to the venue. We had an ensuite powered site. Ensuite was clean and very convenient. Staff  welcomed us and the park had all we needed for our stay. We will definitely return.

Had an amazing time staying at the Big 4 Aireys Inlet. Karen was so lovely and hospitable. I can’t recommend the campground enough. Easy walking distance to all around Aireys - beaches, pub and restaurants. Thank you Karen for such a welcoming and enjoyable stay!

Was a lovely relaxing stay. Close to general store and only a short drive to a few takeaways. Pub just up the road they do takeaway meals as well.
We had our two little dogs with us our cabin was fully enclosed so there was no need to worry about them.
Will be back!
Well located accommodation with good facilities including a stove in the camp kitchen and friendly welcoming staff. Nice to see kids having fun on giant inflatable pillow and pedal carts
Great caravan park with good facilities and very reasonable rates. Reception staff were very helpful ensuring a great stay

We loved our stay at Big 4 in Aireys recently. We enjoyed the relaxed vibe, friendly welcome and local knowledge. It’s a stones throw from the beach and literally right across the road from the little general store and coffee shops as well as a small art gallery. All amenities were clean and fit for purpose. Thank you!
Great place to stay. We stayed for 3 nights, 4 days and did a few day trips around the area. Just a few small issues which I won't put down here but will let them know separately. Highly recommended

My partner and I stayed here for a couple nights and we really enjoyed our stay. The room was really nice and was well supplied. The staff were friendly and helpful, being in a wheelchair myself the staff made us feel welcome and aided to ensure a comfortable stay. Perfect area as well. I couldnt find 1 fault if I tried. Overall, best experience and will be booking here for my next holiday. Thank you so much 😊

We travelled to this park as a last minute decision and are very happy with our choice. From booking over the phone to checking in the staff were so welcoming and friendly. The location allowed us to catch up with family nearby, not to forget the delicious coffee and bakery over the road. We will be coming back!

Karen and James have been as helpful as possible at every stage from booking to the stay. The site has a great location, a friendly atmosphere and it’s clean and well-run. Personal thanks to Karen and James. We’re having a lovely time.
We loved our stay in the Glamping tent. It was exactly as pictured and so spacious for the 3 of us. Would highly recommend for small group of friends/ family or couples!

Amazing place to stay in Aireys Inlet 😍 The BIG4 Aireys Inlet was so friendly and helpful, service amazing and so clean 😍Has everything you need pet friendly and children's Paradise. Location is walking distance to everything Aireys Inlet has to offer. Any way you travel the BIG4 Aireys Inlet has everything you need. 😍
Will definitely be back again,
Thank you BIG4 Aireys Inlet family for an amazing stay,
Much love  Shona
💕😘

We had the most blissful weekend at BIG4 Aireys Inlet. The park was incredibly quiet and peaceful - the perfect place to unwind and recharge. The location is beautiful, surrounded by nature and just a short drive to the stunning beaches and the iconic Split Point Lighthouse.

The facilities were excellent, with plenty of amenities on site that made our stay comfortable and convenient. Everything was well-maintained and family-friendly, which made it even more enjoyable.

One of the best parts was the convenience of having everything right across the street - lovely restaurants, a cosy café, a general store, a pharmacy, and a few other boutique shops.

We truly had a wonderful time and would happily return. Highly recommend for a relaxing coastal getaway!

Fabulous location , it’s a beautiful easy walk to the lighthouse.
We stayed in our self contained van but the shower amenities, laundry were all spotlessly clean .
The receptionist was very helpful in suggesting things to see in the area . Would stay there again
We stayed on a powered caravan site, clean amenities, great staff, great location and very reasonable price.
Great service by the staff, and provided some good information on the town.

We loved our stay at Aireys Inlet Big4- clean & modern facilities, friendly staff & well maintained grounds. We only stayed one night but will definitely be back. Close to shops/restaurants & right on the highway so easy to find. Highly recommend!
Fantastic stay
Very nice caravan park, everything nice and clean, lawn and garden kept tidy and friendly staff upon arrival.

We had a great stay here. Staff were so welcoming on arrival and gave loads of local recommendations. Pitch good and level. Kitchen small but fully equipped. Shower was amazing. Lots of bird life around the park which we loved.
If you've not got a booking but arrive after office hours they put a map up in the doorway of available pitches which we thought great as we've got caught before here (in Oz), that you can't turn up after 6pm/office hours without a booking.
Loved it, loved the area, had a great stay

Pet friendly, human friendly
Loved our visit, definitely recommend

We only live 30 minutes away from Aireys Inlet and the Big4 caravan park has everything you need and its location is spot on. If it’s only for a weekend getaway or a longer stay, you’ll definitely love staying here.

Stayed on a site for 2 nights. The showers were the best, lovely hot water and shower heads. Central location which was perfect for morning bike ride to Apollo Bay and back . Very friendly team as well .

The 3 of us had so much fun GLAMPING at the Airey’s Inlet Big4. I’d highly recommend this novel, fun way to holiday. The beds were comfortable, the shower warm & we had everything we needed. What a bonus to be able to soak in the outdoor bath, relax and enjoy. We’ll be back!

Very comfortable glamping tent, well kitted out. Park itself is not large and reasonably neat and tidy. Swimming pool is small but kids playground is good. The only negative is that it expensive for what it is and the location.

Lovely location. Staff friendly, very clean amenities, lovely quiet spot, lots of friendly bird  life, 2 minute walk to the General Store and cafes.
Great for our little dog. Great coastal walks nearby.
We'll definitely be back.

Great little caravan park. Choice of Single or double concrete slab for our caravan. Being summer the grass was dry and dust. Amenities are very good and clean. All sites appeared to be level. We found it to be a nice quiet park. Would definitely stay again.

Stayed overnight in a camper van and arrived late.  Late check in went well even with the office closed.
Good WiFi and facilities.
We loved our stay at big 4 aireys inlet. The staff were so lovely and welcoming and the cabin & facilities were great. Also walking distance from shops, cafes and pub. Highly recommend.
We stayed in a bark hut on the weekend and it was amazing! ❤️ Great park with good facilities for my 5 year old. Staff were lovely! We will definitely be back 💯👌

We stayed in a family room. Arrival and checking in was super easy, the staff we're very friendly and helpful.
We arrived on a 43 degree day so after putting the air conditioner on we headed straight to the pool. The pool was a little smaller than we anticipated but it was perfect for the kids to play in. There were a few tables with umbrellas and a B.B.Q right next to the pool which is great.
Being so hot we didn't get a lot of use out of the playground, but there was plenty to play on and perfectly shaded for a regular summer day. We would definitely stay again.
A great little family run park - terrific tree-lined sites, greeted warmly by customer-focused staff and a stones throw to some great cafes and the general store!

Love this place, not too big, nice and quiet, super close to shops. Recommend bringing bikes for kids instead of scooters.
Will definitely be back

Everything about the Aireys Inlet Big 4 was absolutely perfect. Friendly staff around the park all the time and nothing was a problem for them. The sites are very well maintained and the ensuite we had was perfect. The activities arrange for the Australia Day long weekend we excellent. We will definitely be coming back!
A lovely quiet caravan park with good ammenities and close to everything , will stay here again.

Cute little caravan park! My daughter and I loved our time away, so much so that we came back for more adventures the week after with friends. Only rec would be grass on the unpowered sites as it got a lil dusty. Other than that, the facilities for kids were fab and staff were friendly.
Great location, walking distance to everything you need including the pub. Lovely staff, glamping tent was great, clean and comfy. Definitely recommend
Great spot,terrific amenities.  Clean and quiet.

Dear BIG4 Aireys Team,

Thank you for reaching out after our stay.

Unfortunately, our experience did not meet expectations, especially considering the price point. The site we were allocated was small, worn, and clearly in need of maintenance. Compared to other stops on our journey, this was by far the most expensive site we stayed at, yet it offered the least value.

Due to the bushfires in Victoria, we were forced to turn back toward Melbourne earlier than planned. During our short stay, we did not use any facilities such as water or electricity, which made the price of AUD 169 feel particularly high for the minimal service received.

We fully understand that you are a family-owned business and appreciate the challenges that come with operating in regional areas. However, at this price level, we expected a better-maintained site and a more balanced value-for-money experience.

We hope this feedback can be used constructively to improve future guest experiences.

Kind regards,
John

We really enjoyed our stay at Big 4 Aireys Inlet.  Peaceful location, in a great location, with larger towns 15min drive either side. We comfortably had 6 people in the 2 bedroom cabin (although the bedrooms were on the smaller side), the cabins were fitted out with everything we needed.
Thanks to the team at Big 4 Aireys Inlet for a wonderful 4 night stay, we will be back!
Great place. Great location. Had everything we needed and kids had a ball .

Our first time in Aireys Inlet and we’re already planning to return for years to come. BIG4 Aireys Inlet is hands down the best on the Great Ocean Road—close to everything, yet wonderfully relaxed. The calm, happy atmosphere shared by staff and guests reflects the incredible culture the team has created. Outstanding facilities and genuinely welcoming people.
Do yourself a favour and book in an unforgettable adventure.
Very well maintained caravan park. Quite small so it's nice and quiet. Walking distance to shops and the pub.

My wife and I booked one of the self contained cottages for a stay over the new year period.  It was easy to check in (and check out) as the staff are very friendly and helpful.  There are great facilities in the room also the park itself.  The location is fantastic!  It's only a short walk to the beach, the lighthouse, the local pub, the general store or any of the local cafes and restaurants.  An ideal destination for a relaxing seaside escape!

Parked our caravan with no issues. The facilities were clean, well maintained, and easy to use. The park staff were friendly, approachable, and up for a chat, which added to the experience. The location is excellent and close to local attractions. There are plenty of trees and birdlife around the park, which gives it a relaxed country feel.

Honestly, a delightful stay start to finish. Staff were friendly, warm and helpful. The cabin was terrific with comfy beds and a decently stocked kitchen, there were multiple clean BBQs to use, and the kids playground was large and safe and fun for a wide variety of ages. The pool is tiny but the kids absolutely loved it. Close to the general store etc for any emergency bits, and about a 2 minute drive to the beach, which was glorious.

A special place to set up camp, Aireys Inlet caravan park was pet friendly and had everything you needed for an enjoyable stay.

Staff were all super friendly and on hand to answer any questions.

To make for an even more enjoyable stay- a kids program or some park activities could be offered prior to 2nd January such as nightly movies in the media room, food truck, craft, face painting or similar.

We also felt for the price paid, the ensuite site could have provided towels and an interim clean (which was provided on request, thank you).

All in all a delightful stay in a gorgeous part of the great ocean road. We will be back!
Great little Caravan Park. Excellent camping sites, private and quiet.  Clean amenities. Great beach nearby at Fairhaven.  Beautiful walks too.
Amazing place to stay in, cafes are just across the road , the cabin was well stocked and had everything we needed. Definitely booking again soon. The staff were very helpful as well.

Sites were a great size. Park was good but needs a games room, basketball or something else. Our daughter was sick the whole time. We asked for big 4 credit so we could return home but the park was not understanding. Lost 2 nights. A little frustrating.

This was our first stop on our Great Ocean Road trip. Beautiful caravan park just outside of Lorne. The kids loved our cabin! we easily went down to enjoy the beach and the community was well kept, full of activities for the kids and had such lovely guests as well. Highly recommend to any family’s that want a nice, clean and convenient place to take your kids.
Clean, beds are comfy, cabin is in a great spot to get everything you need
Fantastic place to stay. Close to everything and Fantastic service and staff.  Fifth time there and will be going back.

Beautiful little spot. Small holiday park with everything you could need. The proof is in the minor details. Lots of hooks in the amenities, family bathroom, lovely manicured sites with no bindis. Loved that dogs allowed even during peak season. Clean & heated pool. Awesome adventure playground. Right across the road from a general store with affordable fuel.

A really great campsite at the start of our Great Ocean Road trip. Something went wrong with the booking, but it was resolved excellently. Very friendly hostess. We camped here again on our return journey and had a wonderful time!

This lovely park is family owned and the staff are very friendly and helpful, they were very accommodating with a change I wanted to make. The park is basic with a very bushy feel and quiet after hours - it was just what I was looking for. A great variety of beautiful birds shared the space with me, such a delight!
The kitchen, laundry and amenities were all clean and well maintained.
A pleasant surprise was the local shops were just a short stroll away, very handy to not have to pack up and drive.
I'll definitely be back.

Stay for two night great friendly atmosphere
Good clean facilities
Pet friendly not like other park located in the area
Close to beach shops and pub
Great all round experience
Went with own RV, hence, room not applicable

We stayed in Cabin 10 with a group of four. The cabin sleeps six and was clean and cosy. The only downside was limited seating, with just one couch available, otherwise seating was at the dining table.

I would recommend carefully reviewing the terms and conditions when booking. Our fifth guest had to cancel two weeks prior to arrival, and we were advised over the phone that a refund would be applied. Upon arrival, we were informed that the policy requires changes to be made at least 30 days in advance. However, our refund was ultimately honoured.
Just a suggestion to the Glamping tents cubby room,the wooden box can maybe be replayed with a 2 step steppy for older people and not just kids use...
We’ve stayed here a few times. This time in one of the safari glamping tents. Will definitely book again it was great.
The Bark Hut was comfy, compact and convenient…just what I wanted for a comfortable and quiet weekend
Stayed on an unpowered site. Great facilities. So peaceful

We booked a powered camp site for 3 nights with another family and had a great stay! Walked to the lighthouse, General Store and great cafes just across the road and walked to dinner at the pub which was great for the kids. Staff were very helpful and friendly at all times.

The facilities were excellent and clean. The interior furnishing looks new and the WiFi actually wasn't too bad as other reviews may have mentioned. No bugs were found and the room was not stuffy. The bathroom was also quite spacious. A short 2 minute walk to Kiem dining and  the (overpriced) general store made this a good location.
Great little park with very good facilities. Ablutions are modern and well maintained. Sites are fairly compact, but comfortable. Great staff.
Perfect spot to stay and head out to experience Aireys Inlet - accomodation clean & comfy, hosts very friendly & helpful

Great spot, 2 minute walk to the brewery and the Greek restaurant is a must.
Host were awesome

Great little park. Informative staff of local attractions. 1 minute walk to a few great eating places.
Highly recommend
A nice little caravan Park with easy sites to get into. Loved our time away and our stay here, was great pub up the rd. Definately worth a visit to this Caravan Park and dog friendly.

Stayed in the 3 bedroom. Was new, clean and well equipped. The pool is close though so kid noises will be present till dusk when it closes. The Sunday market was just across the street and includes many stores.
Safari glamping exceeded expectations- really great set up, well appointed, clean and comfy. Fun for kids too.

Perfect location for exploring the area. Park was very quiet, staff were friendly and helpful.
Travelling with my sister and my dog, this is our second stay here in a pet friendly cabin, which was perfect for us.
The park is just a short walk to the beach, shops and the pub for nightly dinners.

We loved Aireys Inlet! Stayed for 1 night on a powered site which was nice and quiet. Clean toilets/showers and lovely outdoor bbq area that we used for dinner. Nice local shops and restaurants and easy to get to the cute local beach.

We were disappointed with the cost for our dog friendly studio cabin. Very small, all in one room…bed, kitchen, dining. Very overpriced for what we had. They did have bigger cabins available but almost double the cost! The area was nice though, with a short walk down the street, opposite caravan park, that led to the walking track, over looking the cliffs & beach.
A warm welcome with all the necessary explanations and points of interest. The room was neat. All utilities were available. Only the Wi-Fi reception was poor. Otherwise, everything was fine.
This is my favourite Big 4 caravan park. It’s small, friendly, accommodating, we can bring our dog too..
Good park lots of ammenities
Very helpful attendant at check in with site location.

Lovely quiet caravan park in a small village.
Amenities were clean and modern.
Playground and small swimming pool.
Highly recommend! Friendly staff and loved the pod we stayed in. Great experience.
Great location, facilities and friendly staff.

Love it here - staff and management always super friendly
Amenities are spotless and the park is well maintained

Loved our stay. We had such a great time at this caravan park. The cabin was spotless and well set up, and the staff went above and beyond to make our stay enjoyable. The location couldn’t be better — we’ll definitely be back.
We loved this park. The most amazing friendly service & fantastic amenities.
We had such a wonderful time. Great service. Very close to everything you need.
Lovely park, well maintained, helpful friendly owners. Nice family park

Very friendly, room was great.
Ideal spot to start on great ocean rd.
Great communication.
Booked a cabin on the Friday night for a Saturday stay - and snapped up the vacancy. Great location for walking along the beach and to the light house. Will stay again, great value for money.

Nice park. Good location to enable you to go to Apollo Bay, Otways, Lorne, Great Ocean Road, Bells, etc etc. Friendly staff. Clean amenities... Not as fancy as some Big 4s, but suited us for our needs.

James & Karen and the team at Big 4 Aireys have been fantastic. Very personable and attentive, which has created a great environment.
Love the nightly fire!!!
Will be staying here again!!!

Fabulous modem cabin, and very friendly and helpful owners. Super clean and had everything we needed. Great location with shops and restaurants really close by and easy walk to the cliff top walks, beaches and lighthouse. Would highly recommend.

Big4 Aireys Inlet is very central, a short drive to the shops, cafe's, restaurants, pubs, and beaches.
It is, of course, a Big4 Park, the reasons why we chose it.
Can walk to the beach (200 m down Alice Rd to Eagle Rock Parade), or drive to town.
It is very family-oriented, with lots of facilities on offer and lots for the family to do.
Our cabin was good, clean and comfortable.
The Manager was friendly - thank you.
We had a great stay.
Yes, well recommended !
Thank you.

But, Please reduce those concrete speed-bumps, they are a total overkill. We hit the bottom of our Holden Sportwagon every time, just creeping over. You can see the deep scrape marks on the bumps from other vehicles.

What a gem!! Right it's on The Great Ocean road so you can't miss it. The service was excellent, we needed a late check in and Karen was so helpful and kind, she even left a light on for us! The cabins are very tastefully decorated and we felt at home immediately, sitting back and enjoying a cuppa on the balcony. It's only a short stroll to the general store and a couple of cafes, perfect! Ohh and the pool is heated too, it was nice to see the playground being used. We loved our stay and enjoyed a beautiful weekend driving The Great Ocean Road, thanks Big 4 Aireys Inlet

We stayed at Aireys Inlet Big 4 for 4 nights, I don’t always have high hopes or expectations staying at camping parks however, I was completely delighted and impressed walking into our dog friendly cabin. The room was exceptionally clean, it smelt lovely and it was absolutely everything we needed. We had great friendly staff around always willing to help. The local cafes, general store and the pharmacy were full of really nice locals and we loved the beaches, views and atmosphere of Aireys. We would stay here again and will recommend friends and family of this wonderful little park.

Very helpful staff .

A lovely unit .
Will stay again .
Thanks
Big 4  Aures Inlet
Quaint little Big4 with really good amenities and hospitality
Beautiful place to stay, great location, walking distance to everything,  a very quiet location and well maintained park.
Perfect spot to stop on the Grand ocean road
Great spot. Super clean and comfy with nice linen.

Had trouble with the booking process , so we were offered something else which was more than twice the price , we were told it would be warm enough because it had a split system & we were Absolutely freezing all night !!
We didn’t even shower because it was too cold …
Top spot, top accommodation, and top owners. All you could ask for.

We had a great stay!! The kids loved the pool, playground and nightly fire pit!! The location is perfect, walking distance to the beach, the lighthouse and coffee!! And we love being able to stay in a cabin with our pooch ☺️

It was nice! But for the first time in a BiG4 camp site we did not have more flexibility around the check out time. Rules are rules and it’s known that the check out time was at 10am but the day light savings started on the evening prior to the check out, we could not sleep due to the strong winds over night, and we were camping on a tent site. So, I couldn’t understand why there was little flexibility as given in other BiG4 we had been. It would have been a nice treat!

Wonderful family holiday park. Great facilities including jumping pillow, playground, heated pool, pedal carts and play room; giving lots of options to keep the kids occupied. The service was always with a smile and nothing was too much trouble. Aireys Inlet Big4 was the perfect location to walk to the nearby lighthouse, and beach;  with cafes and restaurants conveniently located nearby. Thanks for the memories.

Great little holiday park on the great Ocean road, friendly team on site. We stayed in the safari tent and it was fabulous!! The bath on the deck was pure heaven at night as I listened to the rain on the canvas roof. Bonus of having a well connected tv with Netflix and stuff for the kids to give me a break! They also loved the swimming pool and playground! Will definitely be back.

P.S: if you visit in winter, pack lots of layers and/or thermals as it does get quite cold even with the split system. The main bed does however have electric blankets which are lovely :)

We spent a weekend in an unpowered site at Big4 Aireys Inlet and had a great time. The bathrooms and kitchen were always clean and tidy. The kids loved the facilities - the playground, jumping pillow, outdoor chess etc). All the staff were lovely and the location was brilliant - walking distance to so many cafes and the lighthouse. We will definitely stay again!
Tent was spacious, Cousy and the kids loved it.

Just had a week at this Park at an En-suite powered grass van site. Amenities were clean and well maintained. Keith and the staff were amazing nothing was a bother. The pool and play equipment are well maintained. Look forward to staying again soon.

We loved our stay! Park is clean and in a great location.
Amenities are clean and very modern- they have the best shower heads and pressure!
Staff were lovely and helpful.
Car parking on sites was super tight but not impossible.
“Pooch Parking” was appreciated to be able to enjoy what was on offer and the community herb garden provided some lovely mint!
We’d come and stay again :-)

We stayed in the safari tent and loved it! It was nice and airy and all the decor was safari themed. We had everything we needed including heating for the chilly night. My favourite thing was bathing in the claw foot bath on the verandah watching the native birds fly past; I could have stayed in the bath all afternoon - it was very relaxing. An intimate park with friendly staff! We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and will be back again!
Great service and very friendly staff.

I have the highest amount of gratitude appreciation for this holiday park. Allowing us to use your dryer facilities to sort out my wet camp gear was a godsend without your kindness we would have had to cut our trip short. Only a short drive to see amazing beaches, beautiful waterfalls and the stunning otways.

The cabin was as advertised, very neat and clean the caravan park was well set up and quiet. A great place to stay and I am happy  to recommend BIG4 Aireys Inlet for a quiet and relaxing stay. I will definately be staying there again
Great place, good vibes and elite time

Lovely caravan park nestled in a green and quiet spot on the Great Ocean Rd. Really friendly and helpful owners/staff. Lovely cabins, comfy bedding, well supplied with everything we needed and lots of fun activities for children. Walking distance to the beach and cliff tops. We'll be back!
Friendly staff, clean and great activities for the kids!!! Couldn’t ask for anymore! Loved our stay ❤️
A great little park, friendly and helpful staff five star 🌟

September 2025. Excellent two night stop-over on the Great Ocean Road in our motorhome. Reception very friendly and very helpful. Loads of spaces, concrete, grass all level. Facilities were good, very clean. Good camp kitchen but a little on the small size, seating for 2/3 only. Nice quiet site with good walks via wet lands nature trail to lighthouse viewpoint. A general store, post office, cafe, Greek restaurant, pub all within a 5 minute walk.
Fantastic for kids and families. We are coming back and for longer. Park, swimming, camp kitchen all great. Great family holidays where everyone can relax and enjoy.
I'm loving my stay, James was very welcoming on my arrival. I'm staying in a cosy cabin. The staff was very friendly and helpful.
Always sad when we are leaving. Counting the sleeps until we come back 😁

We booked the ensuite grass site.
It has clean facilities (common kitchen, shared facilities, and attached ensuite), awesome friendly services.

The staff even reached out m, helped us with a tent emergency during a sudden strong wind.

Will definitely recommend.
Great park. Wonderful staff. A km or so to the beach. Had difficulty getting the BBQ lights on but eventually rescued
Staff were very polite and lovely, beds were amazing compared to a lot of motels I’ve stayed at. Overall an amazing place.
Lovely stay.

A great park with exceptional friendly service.
A fire was lit for us to enjoy the company of other campers.
Definitely will be returning

Friendly, helpful staff. Great location. We had a grass ensuite site, the ensuite was clean and tidy.
Very happy!

Our family had a cabin and a caravan site, for a family gathering. The staff were very friendly and arranged them close together. The park and facilities are modern, very clean and tidy. The location is fabulous with shops over the road and magic beaches a short stroll away. A quieter and for us a better experience than towns that are busy and super touristy.

Our first stay here and everything was perfect.
The cabins have been taken care of well, very clean and tidy. Such a friendly team by everyone in the park. I’ll definitely come back here to stay 😀😀

James was very helpful from booking to end of our stay. We stayed in hut, wanted a different experience, which was good.
Thank you!

We had a fantastic experience at this Big 4 park. The facilities were excellent — clean, well-maintained, and convenient. The staff were friendly, welcoming, and always happy to help, which made our stay even more enjoyable. The entire park was kept neat and tidy, and it’s clear there’s a real sense of pride in the way they run things. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a comfortable and relaxing stay.
Very clean cabin, well priced
We were last weekend and we had a great time. Nice clean and comfortable camp site. Loved the concrete slab.

Our cabin was very clean and well equipped with everything you would need on a holiday. Great value and lovely, helpful staff. Special thanks to Keith who helped with a flat battery.😅 I would definitely recommend this park and will return.
great little caravan park nicely maintained and good facilitates highly recommend

We are travelling in our Van.  Stayed 3 nights . Receptionists was very friendly and helpful. Very clean amenities.

The cabins looked great , everything really good here.
Fabulous, great park to stay. Friendly operators
Stayed at the powered site, well maintained amenities/facilities, booked on call, the reception was very kind to help me make booking with the accomodations that I wanted. Highly recommended.
Super friendly service and we had a great stay. The location is perfect and the beds were super comfy. Will definitely be staying at Big4 Aireys Inlet again on our next trip!
Great getaway location. Loved that we could bring our dogs and have a relaxing time away in a comfy cabin.  Staff were friendly and accommodating.

Excellent option for a family stay. Our cabin was cosy, clean, and very well provisioned. The kids loved the adventure playground and jump mat. Handy location with a general store across the road, and a pub close by for meals. Thanks to the friendly staff for a great visit.

Had a cozy cabin here for the night. And the small pool really was 27 degrees on the chilly 6 degree morning we took a plunge before leaving.
Nice clean campground.
Nice quiet relaxing park, within travel distance along Great Ocean road
Very welcoming and super cosy, clean cabin. Great location for walks and exploring close by places.
Wonderful place to be, amazing service.

We stayed in a safari tent there and it was an amazing experience. We did go off peak so it wasn’t packed and also the place is small, which I liked cos I could get around quicker. The only thing I would change is the big 4 sign isn’t lit up all the time at night so it makes it hard to find the place. I did drive past it a few times.
Quiet during winter.
Lovely caravan park in wonderful location with modern facilities.

This is a beautiful caravan park. The service I was given when booking was excellent. The friendly hosts catered to my needs in regards to an easy drive thru van site as I travel on my own. My dog was made very welcome as well. Walk across the road to shops and short walk to scenic clifftop, lighthouse and beach. Excellent location. I will be staying here again.

The staff were friendly and helpful. Suggesting possible places to visit after me talking about my holiday.

All the facilities were clean and well cared for.

The kitchen was well stocked with utensils, plates, etc.

I would recommend this location to fellow travellers.

It was great! Check in was easy and the service was so friendly. So cosy and cute and had everything you needed in one little hut. Was recommend  cliff walk near by and that was easy to get to and had great views.

Beautiful little bark hut, very cozy and has everything you need. Thank you Karen for putting the heater on for us before we got there!
Definitely will be coming back!!

Very well presented park perfect for families. Room spotless and very fresh. Customer service, very friendly and accommodating. I can’t recommend these guys high enough. Normal, real down to earth people

Beautiful clean cabins, great spot for little kids with a big fenced playground and heated all year round pool! Staff are super lovely and helpful. Location is great, can walk across the street to a little general store and some cute cafes and the aireys pub is walking distance as well. Near the beach and not a far drive to lots of nice attractions. Can't recommend this place enough

We Stayed at Aireys Inlet caravan park over the June 2025 Kings birthday long weekend. Was in a great location, walking distance to local stores and cafes, The Aireys Pub is a great spot for lunch, dinner or drinks and offer an outdoor alfresco so you can bring your pets along.a short stroll to walking tracks along the cliffs edge and secluded beach, walking distance to the iconic lighthouse and boardwalk which was featured on a child’s film back in the 90’s “Round the Twist”.
The caravan park has everything you need for a comfortable and enjoyable stay. Pet friendly so your fury loved ones can join in the adventures, Heated pool all year around, clean amenities, well equip camp kitchen, child’s playground and jumping pillow. On arrival, the staff were very friendly and provided maps and attractions in the local area. The caravan park is well kept and maintained, nightly communal fit pit where you can socialise with other fellow campers. Although the weather was not the best, we made the most of our stay and will return to this amazing caravan park. Many thanks. OL&S
Quiet and roomy caravan power site, dog friendly with good walking trails. Very friendly and arochable owners with plenty advice of what to see. Clean facilities.

It was an awesome campsite! We were there in our car and all was perfect, the bathrooms were clean the kitchen had all the equipments and the vibe was great! Loved it! The nightsky was beautiful, and there was a bonfire!

We had a wonderful stay in the glamping tent. The grounds and facilities were spotless and Karen at Reception was very hospitable and welcoming. Would highly recommended when staying in Airey’s Inlet. Close to the local shops, pub and of course the Lighthouse. Great place for kids: chess board, games room, inflatable, pool and playground. We will be back!

Well maintained amenities and very friendly lady, Karen, at reception. Had a good unpowered tent stay here while riding my bike across the GOR.

Pub and restaurant are close enough to walk down to.

Very clean and comfortable accommodation with everything we needed.
Location was excellent- short walk to the shops and it was a lovely cliff top walk to the lighthouse. We will certainly return for another holiday break.

This caravan park is just fabulous! We were here around the same time last year (mid-May) for a few days and this year, rather than just a powered site, we opted for an ensuite site which was great. The ensuite was spotless and the general park amenities are exceptional. There is a small heated pool, a well-equipped camp kitchen, multiple bbq’s available to guests and a variety of accommodation styles. Sites are of a good size and there are many local walks, cafes and attractions close by. Alternatively both Lorne and Anglesea are just a short drive away. This will not be our last stay at the Big 4 Aireys Inlet.

What a lovely friendly park in such a beautiful part of the world! The little cabin had everything you could need and was super cute.
The staff were so helpful and friendly , even when I managed to get bogged on a nearby track they were committed to assisting from afar. Over and above.
I will definitely return. Loved it!
This was a perfect stop on our exploration of the Great Ocean Road. Beautiful location. Everyone is so friendly.💕
Airey Inlet Big 4 provide excellent service.
Such a comfy room - we stayed one night in a cabin - plenty of room for 3 of us, and all the equipment we needed.
Van park - quite, handy to amenities and beach, bush walks, very clean, comfortable cabin and orderly management in lovely surroundings. We enjoyed our week stay immensely.
Beautifully kept, small caravan park, with friendly helpful staff! Our van ensuite site was well located within the park and exceptionally clean. Would definitely stay again.

Lovely dog friendly unit for 3 nights.
Communal fire pit.
Friendly owners/staff.

Loved our stay in the Bark Hut!
So cute and clean - presented very well.
Staff were fantastic and welcoming.
The park is in such a great location - walking distance to all you need. 10/10

We had an amazing stay, the site was perfect, the amenities were clean and new, we loved going to the firepit at 5.30 and playing chest with others.  Everyone was so nice and friendly.  I highly recommend staying here and being so close to the beach made it even better.
Ensuite site with warm shower and level concrete ground, hosts are fantastic and park is clean in good location
Beautiful spot along the great ocean road. Karen at reception was so lovely and welcoming. Amenities were excellent clean and modern would definitely recommend staying here again.🥰

Wonderful Park and Fantastic Location.
Staff very friendly.

The checkin process was quite good and smooth.
The kitchen was quite small, but had everything yew needed, except instant coffee and tea bags which we usually got from other big4 sites. However outdoor tables and chairs were lack of maintenance and covered with dust.
The bath room was clean and bath water was hot and the pressure was quite good.
Friendly and helpful.
Great location and facilities. Clean and tidy cabins.
Staff are extremely friendly and helpful!!! Great facilities and a great park !

We camped here over Easter and it was a great park. Keith does an amazing job of maintaining the parks cleanliness and all my kids knew him by name as he gives the park such a  great atmosphere. A nightly fire is lit and it's got such a nice relaxing feel about it.

This is an amazing little gem. Not a huge park but plenty of room on our grass site that we didnt feel ontop of our neighbours. Perfect little pool and great playground for the kids. But my favourite part was the thought of having family toilet seats in each toilet which allowed my kids to independently toilet!! Winning. Topped off by hand held shower heads. The little things that make traveling with kids so much easier.
The staff are super friendly too.
Great location

Friendly staff, Rooms clean. Location was ok.
Not a bad place to stay.
Perfect little cabin for our first trip away with my little Italian Greyhound.

The room was far too expensive for what it was—$451 per night for such a small space didn’t feel worth it. It also wasn’t made clear anywhere that the accommodation is inside a caravan park, which was disappointing. Overall, I wasn’t happy with the stay.

Great park. We stayed in our bago and it was quiet and peaceful. The park and amenitys were clean and well maintained and the owners/caretakers were very friendly and helpful. We were very happy with our stay, we highly recommend this park.
Clean, tidy and well organised, definitely worth visiting again

We stayed in a small, unpowered tent site, where we put up our tent and used our camper van as well. We made full use of the very good amenities: clean toilets, hot showers, well-equipped kitchen. Everyone was very friendly and helpful when I discovered that we had left our tent pegs at home!
Great location and the staff and really friendly and helpful. Rooms are comfortable and clean the pool was warm and well maintained.

Great stay in Aireys Inlet. The cabin has all you need, park has great facilities and the staff were so good. We got a text message while we were there to say the firepit was being lit, if we wanted to come and join in. How’s that for service! Will be back on our next adventure to the Great ocean road

Amazing glamping stay in a family safari tent. The whole family thoroughly enjoyed the safari tent experience.  The amenities were great, the location was very close to local shops and the split point lighthouse. The only downside for us was the zips not working on the fly screen and main safari tent front entrance. Apart from this it was a great stay.

I love this campground. It is quiet and relaxing - traffic cannot be heard from the campsites- but the beach sounds are loud and clear, which is a joy. The facilities are first rate. We always camp and use the camp kitchen when it’s cold it the wind picks up. It is diacious and well equipped. Great hosts too, they really think ofyour every need. They provide a fire on cold nights and there is an outdoor bbq area with a giant chess set, which everyone can enjoy. I love the attention to detail, a herb garden and lovely planter boxes.
Beautiful clean ensuite and generous site. Beautiful park with everything you need
Not a huge park which is why we love it. The staff are friendly and super helpful.
Our stay was very enjoyable. Service was outstanding, amenities very clean and park tidy. Perfect place if doing great ocean rd. We will  back.
Ideal for our two day break with our dog
Highly recommend! Accommodation was clean and very comfortable and location is great too.

Very surprised to witness the bad behaviour of a staff member who was yelling at a young lady and was calling her names.   Very unnecessary and off putting for myself and my partner who had just arrived.
Wouldn’t be back and wouldn’t recommend

This caravan park is so well kept. Gorgeous gardens and trees all around the park. The owners a very nice and eager to help you if you need them. I would surely stay there again and recommend this place to all who are considering staying.😊🇦🇺
Great place to stay, great staff
The park and facilities are really nice, the staff are welcoming and the cabin was perfect for us.
Had a lovely stay in a cabin with our dog.  Easy walking to everything and the cabin was super clean and tidy with everything you could need.

Our stay was extremely disappointing. Staff gave conflicting information, and when I questioned it, I was accused of lying (by the unpleasant lady behind the desk)—completely unacceptable. Despite booking as a group six months in advance, we were split up on arrival with no effort to fix it. The sites were cramped, and the amenities were below standard. Overall, poor service and a frustrating experience. Would not recommend.
There were no dooner covers on the bunk beds, so it made a cold night for one person and it was too late to contact the office before we realised

The park was small and well set up. Combination of cabins, ensuite sites and powered sites. Amenities were excellent, clean hot showers with great water pressure. The pool, rec room and camp kitchen were tidy and stocked with books to exchange and  kitchen equipment to use whilst there. If you didn’t wish to cook there were restaurants and a pub very close. We based ourselves here as it was quiet and then did day trips.

Aireys Inlet is a very beautiful town and the Big 4 Family caravan park is really lovely. The staff are great. Really helpful. The shops are across the street and the coastal cliff walk is just down the road.

Quiet and relaxing
Very friendly staff
Clean

Very quiet and peaceful
Close to walking tracks

The caravan site was spacious and easily accessible.
The site was affordable, particularly given this was on a Music Festival weekend.
The amenities block was spotless, with everything in working order.
The staff were interested and helpful.
A wonderful place.
We stayed on a powered site and had a lovely 3 day weekend.  Small park, well maintained, friendly service.
Really enjoyed our stay. The accommodation was clean and comfortable. Great location and from the moment we checked in we felt welcome.

Had a great time,  great walks, lovely beaches very central. Caravan park well looked after and clean toilets and showers. We appreciated the notification for an early checkin being a public holiday the traffic was busy and parking for caravans along the Great Ocean Rd was limited.

First time to Big 4 Aireys Inlet and can't wait to come back. We loved it. Stayed on an unpowered site. Great family friendly park which was quiet at night time so the kids could sleep. Shared facilities were clean, shower pressure was amazing, kids loved the playground, and jumping pillow. Truly dog friendly, walking distance to Cafe, general store and pharmacy. Short drive to dog friendly beach which is accessible to dogs at all times. Service was amazing and super friendly. Pool was a little smaller than expected but heated to perfection. Would make the fenced area around the pool to include the seated area adjacent to ensure adequate and easy supervision of children whilst in pool. Got a little crowded in the current fenced area. Thanks for a lovely long weekend. We will see you next time 😊

A great caravan park and dog friendly as well. We had an ensuite site which was near the front of the park and pool. The ensuite was new and very clean as were the rest of the facilities. Can't wait to come and stay again. Super friendly staff

A  nice little caravan park , clean , close to shops & beach.,also lovely helpful  managers clair , Keith, Karen & James  And thanks to Keith for making sure my van was safe to tow. !  Look forward to get back there for my 3rd time.  Kate

The cabins we rented were clean and well appointed. It was difficult to find detailed info of what was included in each cabin. Although it said linen was provided, it was only bottom sheets. On hot nights a top sheet would have been welcome.
Also the office closes at 5 pm and there is no emergency number if there is a problem.
But we had a lovely stay at Aireys inlet.

I'm new to caravaning so it was a great maiden adventure and weekend getaway. We (myself and the doggo's) really enjoyed our short stay and plan to do another trip asap.
The ensuite site was ideal, with easy access and setup. Everything we needed.
Thank you Big4 Aireys!

Loved our stay at BIG4 Aireys Inlet, check-in was friendly and welcoming the park facilities were convenient, clean and well maintained. Lots to see and do in the area. We will definitely stay here again.

Beautiful caravan park, clean facilities,  fantastic playground for little ones and superb location for beach visit, general store, cafes.
What I would like to point out is amazing, friendly and understanding staff, especially the receptionist Karen. Thank you so much for upgrading my tent site to cabin for deal price and having me venting about tiredness on road trip solo with 3 kids. Your empathy was so much appreciated, Karen.. truly top person in her role.

The Bark Huts were not advertised on Booking.com as being in a caravan park. The 'hut' was incredibly small and had a tv that either had no reception or dropped in and out constantly. It had a 'mirror' in the bathroom the size of a postage stamp over to one side so you had to bend under the curved roof to see in it and there was no where to put toiletries. Incredibly over priced for what it was, especially considering I stayed in a huge beautiful motel room in Apollo Bay for two nights for only $50 more than this 'hut' was for one!
The man at the desk at the caravan park, however, was extremely kind and went out of his way to be helpful, coming to look at the tv and eventually moving me to a cabin with a bit more space a a (mostly) functioning tv.
I camped, and was impressed with the friendly and helpful staff, the immaculate showers and toilets, and camp kitchen.

Great location, reasonably priced for modern caravan park on great ocean road. Showers have fantastic pressure, pool is warmed and kitchen is well equipped. Star lost due to some tent sites being very small- fit for campervans only and I was placed there with a swag. I fit no worries as I have a small car but others may not. Great stay 2 nights.
First Big4 experience....great! we will be back!

Very clean cabins, the caravan park is very well kept, friendly staff.
Bonus is pet friendly

Booked a group of 15 for a weekend, and it was absolutely the best park experience. You're not too far from the dog-friendly beaches, there's 2 nice cafes and a restaurant nearby, a pub just down the road. So that's 5 stars for the location.
The rooms are standard cabins, but with very solid floors and powerful aircon in every cabin we chose.
The bark huts are magnificent and perfect for singles or couples, and feel like a luxury resort.
Service, all questions were answered, correspondence was prompt and helpful, and staff worked hard to handle every question.
Note: The pool is very small. We just went to the beach instead. Three stars for the pool.

Staff were very friendly and helpful. The park was dog friendly which made our stay even better. The park was really quiet at night and well managed. I would definitely revisit. The cabin was small but very clean and had everything we needed.
Great little park. Very clean. My kids loved the playground and heated pool. Service was great and Park is located close to cafes and restaurants.
What a great little holiday park! The kids love the playground and games room, the units are well maintained and clean, mattresses and pillows are great too.

Such a beautiful location. Everything you need is here, hot showers, media room, camp kitchen and picnic tables scattered in various spots to enjoy the view.  The staff are very helpful and friendly. Don't miss a swim at Eagle Rock cove when the tide is high.
There is only one very small general store that is ridiculously over priced and limited so come prepared or hit up the local pub for a delicious meal.

We love staying at the Aireys Inlet Big 4 with our camper van. The location is perfect for walking to the beach, heading out to nearby restaurants and for relaxing. We love the quietness of the park and have met some lovely people here. The staff are kind and helpful at all times. Amenities are clean and plentiful.

staff were lovely! pool was great for kids!
we booked a powered site and had access to wifi but unfortunately wifi didn't reach our site.
camp kitchen and toilets clean and well looked after.

First of all I Loved that this park was dog friendly! And secondly I loved that our cabin was beautiful and clean! Modern, fresh, and clean, and the enclosed balcony was fantastic also. Accommodation where we couldn’t bring out ‘Dog baby’ just wasn't an option for us.
Our check in and check out was easy, with friendly service. The park had everything that anyone could need and was neat and tidy, and in a great location! We walked to the pub for tea/dinner which was also dog friendly.
We needed a short stay accommodation and at short notice. I will definitely return, and will Highly recommend to friends and family.
Rooms perfect for my family’s staff friendly location good. My kids love here  my daughter said she wanna stay here forever 😁
Cannot fault. Our three person cosy cabin.  Spotless. Everything you need inc milk and tea/coffee. Even face washers.  Hair dryer. Comfy bed. Very organised and responsive.  Would recommend 100%
Best place

Awesome park that was excellent value for money.
These were by far the best showers we have come across… nice clean amenities, tidy grounds. Great central location.
Cosy, must try the bath!
This place is Fantastic, perfect for families with children. We have hired a 2 bedroom cabin and it’s beautiful, we will definitely be back!

Hi, we had neighbors next to our tent in a cabin who had fights, discussions, entertainement the whole night. There should be someone from the camp site to oversee that rules like night silence are observed. Intense gas smell from
water heater of the neighboring bungalow whenever they used the water. We were otherwise pleased with the facilities. 5 out of 10

Great location, pub next door and beach a quick walk from the camp. Staff were friendly and I loved the media room which I could chill in before going to sleep (camping in my car). Was pricey even for a single unpowered site I felt, but I did visit during peak season so that is understandable. Overall would recommend!
great place pool was really small but everything else was great.

We thoroughly enjoyed our recent visit. The cabin was lovely, peaceful and clean and the team was very friendly and helpful. There was a handy well-stocked general store across the road and it was a close drive to all the big local attractions. Being able to sit on the deck with a cuppa,  listening to all the birds and enjoying the cool summer breeze was a bonus! Would definitely love to go back again.
Very nice spot to stop. Clean facilities, great amusements for the kids. Walking distance to shops, cafe, pup and restaurants. Great communication with the management too. 10/10.

Staff were very helpful.
Park was excellent for young children with many activities to keep them busy

Never thought to be leaving a negative review on our favourite holiday destination. After 17 years of watching this caravan park grow, we are so disappointed this time around with the new rules and changes. We have brought many people to this park, giving them more business as we could not fault it. There has been multiple disappointing factors this year, but mostly the rebooking rules has deterred us the most. Myself and my family along with multiple other families that have been rebooking the same spot and dates for the last 17 years+ were told that is not the case this time around and instead we have to wait until feb for bookings to open up and try fight for our spot and if we miss out it’s bad luck. A family caravan park should have loyalty and customer service. It is safe to say the caravan park isn’t  what it used to be and the family feel is unfortunately not there anymore.
Great park with good facilities and friendly staff. Pet friendly which allows the whole family to enjoy a trip together.

Couple travelling from South Australia. We recently stayed at this park and were impressed with its cleanliness and facilities. The park is conveniently located within walking distance to a beautiful beach, a stunning lookout, and local amenities such as a general store, cafe, and restaurants. While it was quite busy with kids during our stay, we acknowledge that it was school holidays. The ocean views were breathtaking and just a short walk away. We highly recommend staying here. The front desk lady was friendly and welcoming, even giving our puppy plenty of attention. Thank you for a wonderful stay.
Lovely staff, very clean little cabin. Great location, great camp ground. Very comfortable stay. Would happily return.

We recently stayed in a cabin that sleeps 8 people.
The cabin was clean and modern however it was a bit disappointing it didnt have a dishwasher given that its designed for a large family or group.
The park itself doesnt have many amenities and the pool is outdated and small.
Overall $730 per night is a bit overpriced given the above.
Perfect place to come with your furry friend. Great location, It is clean, the staff were kind. We will come back!
Great experience and nice people
TV and Wi-Fi signal very weak. No wardrobe.

Big 4 Airies is an utterly fabulous place to stay.
My two kids and I throughly enjoy our camping.
Staff are always friendly helpful and welcoming.
Location brilliant, including for inland hikes.
Love revisiting this relaxed Big 4 park!

We had a delightful few nights at BIG4 Aireys Inlet! Perfect location with the general store and cafes across the road, and the kids LOVED the pool and playground. Everything was clean and well maintained. We will definitely be back!

We have camped at BIG4 Aireys inlet the last 2 years over Xmas and new year, and it's a great campsite. Plenty for the kids to enjoy and close to Lorne, Anglesea etc.
Would highly recommend
Lovely staff, sites and a perfect-sized caravan park with entertainment for the kids. Close walk to the beach and lighthouse, also a general store, cafe, pub and restaurants!

We have come to this beautiful park for two decades and enjoyed it immensely but this year the cost has skyrocketed and is too much for pensioners and young families in my opinion. Such a pity as it has been known for being a reasonably priced holiday at the beach. Not sure why the increase and no communication as to the price hike, no doubt a business decision.

Normally a big fan of a big4. This one was mediocre.  Small dinky pool, rec room av not working, master bed on runaway wheels that meant ur pillow would end on floor. Dvd in room could not be plugged in. If it says double or queen.. probably going to be a double. Would recommend for a night.. probably not for an extended stay. Smallest cabin we have encountered. Better for small people. Water pressure was great.
Great location, good site management, clean facilities and lots of activities for the young and old.

This park is located on a very busy road. Cabins 8 and 9 are located right next to the road and have no soundproofing. Expect to be woken from 6.30 am by the traffic noise. In peak season the cabin for 2 people costs over $300 a night. This information is not provided at the time of booking. Not a relaxing holiday when you are situated next to a freeway. I used to live on kingsway in the cbd and the noise level is about the same.
Friendly staff, fully equipped public kitchen, and all public areas such as BBQ oven, laundry room, bathroom are very clean.
Wonderful little and quiet campground. Lovely owner/ staff, clean facilities, great location and perfectly quiet. 100% what we hoped for.
Great location and friendly staff. We stayed in a tiny cabin, and it was tiny, but it had everything we needed. Loved the beach and being able to walk everywhere we wanted to go.
Fabulous park. Clean and friendly. Great position.
A great little park in a superb location on the Great Ocean Road, with large sites,  modern amenities & very friendly staff. Definitely worth a stay
Clean park, good facilities and friendly staff. Not much more you could ask for.
We had a great one night stay.
Very Clean and extremely helpful . Would highly  recommend  .

Our stay at Aireys Inlet Big 4 was part of testing out our new campervan before we head out on a long trip next year.  And ... to see how our little dog copes with a trip longer than a run to Bunnings!
Our stay at Aireys Inlet Big 4 was just right.  The location is good; the park is neat and tidy; the camp kitchen really good; and, the en-suite to our campervan site was brilliant.
We would recommend the Aireys Inlet Big 4 to anyone wanting to spend time along the coast, in a spot that isn't overrun with holiday crowds.
Cute campground with nice amenities and lovely staff!
Enjoyed the tranquility and intimacy of this lovely bush setting caravan park
Clean bathrooms, good showers, nice little pool, and lovely staff

Just finished up my stay at Big 4 Aireys. Unreal stay. Staff were amazing and so helpful, plenty of activities and space for the young ones and awesome location to walk to the local cafes and pub all within 400m. Will stay again nothing surer!
Enjoying our trip away at Aireys Inlet.
So good, clean. Chefs kiss **

Beautiful park supported by friendly staff. Well controlled pet policy. Our Van site was clean and level with ease of parking the van.  Such a peacefull park with access to shops and the pub just a short walk away. A top spot on the Great Ocean Road
Thanks so much, never been glamping before and will definitely book again.  Wonderful stay which was very relaxing and the layout and everything that was included exceeded my expectations ❤️

Absolutely Fantastic! 5 STARS!

Excellent Location, the 3 cosy cabin has everything you need except an iron+board. Maybe something to consider in the near future.
Reception was excellent I must say! She really makes you feel comfortable and Well come.

We will be definitely be coming back!

Congrats to the whole team!!!

This was a great place location to w plate the GOR. The people we meet there were kind, courteous, helpful and above all else very nice.

We stayed in a site with our large setup and fit well. It was tight to get in the site but that is what we get for having a big setup.
Absolutely beautiful stay in the Glamping tent. So relaxing and tranquil.We enjoyed watching the stars from our private  outdoor bathtub. We can’t wait to come back. Thankyou 💕
very friendly and clean amenities
Am in the middle of a 4 night stay in very modern cabin. Staff are very friendly and helpful. A short stroll to shops ,cafes and beach. Definitely worth the 5 stars.
Fantastic little caravan park. Definitely stay again. Shower was absolutely amazing. Clean, hot and wonderful pressure.

The staff were super friendly and very generously gave us a late checkout.
The cabin was super clean, well stocked in kitchen and bathroom.
Great facilities in the park.
Excellent spot, great amenities! Friendly staff. Great location. So many great towns and beaches to visit nearby.
It was a great place to stay great facilities and friendly staff will stay there again.

BIG4 Aireys Inlet was absolutely perfect. Great location and close to beautiful restaurants and cafes. Easy walk to beach, cliff walk and lighthouse. Best of all, we were able to bring our dog who was made feel very welcome by Hannah and the lovely staff.  We camped on an ensuite site, which was fabulous. Next time we might try one of the dog friendly cabins as they look fantastic. It was also great to see lots of families with their children. Looking forward to returning soon.

Very clean amenities and friendly staff. Easy walk to local pub
Happy with our stay

We had a lovely weekend in a cabin at Aireys BIG4. The park is small but perfect for our younger kids, who had a lot of fun at the playground and in the heated pool. The staff at reception were very friendly.

Ein sehr schöner und ruhiger Campingplatz,  kurzer Fussweg zum Klippenwanderweg. Die Laundry war sehr sauber und recht neue Geräte. Die Toiletten-Kabine war toll. Wäre toll, wenn Handtücher zur Verfügung gestellt werden. Personal sehr freundlich.

Had a great night in the gramping tents. Super smooth Check In/ Check out and reception was really lovely.

We needed some of the kitchen plates to take home for the left over food from the BBQ and they were kind enough to give them to us. Appreciate it so much.

PS, heated pool was super fun!!!
Highly recommend!! 😍
Absolutely loved the stay at the tenit site, beautiful swimming pools and very clean facilitate, can wait till next visit.
The Park was well laid out and the amenities block was always clean.  Staff were super friendly.  The Park was a good size - left there feeling very relaxed.

Well located and very clean, we have stayed at this caravan park many times and always enjoyed the coffee van and lolly bag on check in.  Unfortunately these are both long gone and a few other cost savings measures are evident in the rooms and around the park, with room rates increasing accordingly.  Still a good option at Aireys Inlet.

Great vibe, good amenities, excellent location, spacious double-wide-slab caravan sites. Has a real sense of community. Staff are lovely and helpful, really went above and beyond to make our stay great!
A lovely quite spot to stop.  Places to get a drink and some food across the road.  And some lovely beach vistas within walking distance.
We had a very enjoyable little family getaway at Big 4 caravan park. Pet friendly & great place to stay while exploring this part of great ocean road
great place stay! had an amazing time
Great location on the GOR, perfect for a long weekend
Rooms  were very clean and comfortable, the whole park was very neat. Facilities were very good and the park is in a very good location, our stay was very enjoyable and we would stay there again.

Loved our time at Big 4 Aireys Inlet. We stayed in a glamping tent, it was so much fun with our 2 kids. It was really clean and modern and had everything you could think of. The kids got the camping feeling and we had the modern amenities. The outdoor bath was great, kids and myself loved it. Location of Big 4 is great, local shops across the road.

I would highly recommend staying here.
Great Place . Friendly good service

This was a very empty and not entertaining caravan park. There’s no basketball court, small pool. And it was very muddy and dirty. This place is overpriced for what it has. And the kids won’t have any entertainment here.
5 night stay, very clean, terrific facilities. Walking distance to coastal walks, general store, cafes etc. Even a lovely Art Gallery.

Great park with clean facilities. Kids loved the playground, staff were fantastic at ensuring our groups in vans and cabins were together. Family bathroom with a bath was a delight bonus for our kids.

Perfect location to see all that Aireys Inlet has to offer! Less then 5 minute drive to stunning beaches, also has a convenience store within walking distance.
We spent the weekend in a coastal villa, it was great.
My two daughters had a great time in the heated pool & loved feeding the wild birds that visited us.
Hannah from reception was super friendly and welcoming.
The ensuite camp-site was lovely and clean. Fantastic facilities, and warm, friendly staff. We will be back again for sure.

Unfortunately this was the most expensive caravan park we stayed in during our travels between Qld, NSW and Victoria along the coastline. We were charged $99 (this was after an $11 Big 4 members discount) for one night for a grass/dirt/muddy site for three people mid winter. Access road is dirt, amenities are a little dated (as like many parks) but most importantly these were clean. Reception staff were friendly.

Great location, though our cabin was closest to the road so there was some road noise evident (quietened off over night).

I would suggest the common camp kitchen needs more space, as it was limited to only one family at a time, and the same with the communal fireplace.

Also noticed that our cabin had a shower curtain where others had a modern shower screen - far easier for the kids!

The accom itself was otherwise very comfortable and clean and the staff attentive. We would definitely recommend and return.
Gorgeous place, the best check in experience ever! The cabin was clean, warm and just right.
Campeggio tenuto molto bene, personale disponibile e cordiale

I have stayed here every year for 14 YEARS STRAIGHT!!!! They have got new owners now and increased our two week stay from $3000 to $11,000!!! For the EXACT same holiday. It’s appalling.  New owner had not an ounce of sadness or understanding when telling us this, if anything, seemed happy to see us go. We go with 6 other families and EVERY SINGLE ONE will never come again. So disappointing and a real show of capitalism over any sort of human relatedness. There should be NO need to increase it that much. Good luck with those ridiculous prices. So appalling.

We stayed in the Pet-Friendly cabin in March 2024 and found it to be fantastic for a holiday with our dog. The cabin is compact, but fully functional and had everything we needed. |Having the fenced patio was great as we could confidently leave the door open and let the dog come and go knowing he was safely enclosed. And we enjoyed sitting at the outdoor table having a drink as the sun set. |The park itself was well laid out and maintained and the staff were exceptionally helpful. Thoroughly recommended.

Well it was a last minute booking and Tom was fantastic organising our stay in caravan park , Lisa was also very helpful , it was a trip that we will remember for a long time, very nice clean and safe park , shops just around the corner, no hassles with anything really!! We will be coming back to stay in the lovely park again , soo thank you Tom .

Absolutely disgusting service.. turned away on a long weekend as our veichle is too big yet there is more than enough to park a van and truck on. Disgusting service and attitude from the get go. Take your service elsewhere

Pools super small, but it’s nice and heated. So as long as it’s not busy it’s fine.

Rooms are okay, clean.

Overall it’s a good basic caravan park.

Great location, fabulous service.
Rooms were clean and well maintained. Staff were very helpful and extremely friendly. The site is located in the centre of town and close to everything you need

It is definitely not suitable for children, there is no such thing as a grass area, the camping area is pitted, hard ground, dusty and protruding roads. We were going to stay for 7 days, we only stayed for 2 days. It is absolutely terrible. It does not even deserve 1 star. It ruined our holiday. The ground is made of concrete.

Great short stay here camping - staff were friendly and helpful, facilities are well equipped and clean, and generally has a peaceful and relaxing vibe! Located just down the road from the Airey's pub which is also a great spot. Looking forward to returning
We camped here for a couple of nights with the kids and loved it, super chill, good facilities, great location.  Would stay again

Absolutely thrilled with our stay at Big 4 Aireys Inlet! Melissa and Glen were outstanding hosts – extremely helpful and welcoming, making our experience even more enjoyable.
