We stayed in the pod, which was fantastic! It was not only spotlessly clean but also incredibly comfortable, perfect for a glamping experience. The amenities at Big 4 are top-notch, all well-maintained and nice. Highly recommend this place for a relaxing getaway. We're already looking forward to our next visit!
A delightful caravan park. Close to all amenities. Staff were very friendly. The little outdoor cafe was a nice touch.
Beautiful park, friendly and helpful staff, very clean amenities, easy walk to shops and restaurants.

Le camere in “botte” sono una vera chicca che da un valore aggiunto al camping. Sfortunatamente quando siamo stati lì era brutto tempo e non abbiamo goduto adeguatamente della struttura che sembrava ben attrezzata. Unico neo negativo: la rete Wi-Fi prende poco o per nulla in alcuni punti, spero la migliorino.

Awesome little caravan park. Hannah, Blake, Glen and all the staff do an amazing job and are super friendly and accomodating.

The amenities are spotless, well stocked camp kitchen  ,close to the beach,coffee van on site and a great playground for the little ones.

Cheers for a great stay team!

Wonderful Park🏞, amenities were beautiful and clean, communal kitchen, very clean, oven, microwave, filtered water 💦 huge chess set, BBQ area, staff very helpful, ice-cream 🍦 van on site, Pool. Dog friendly, shops close by. Lots of site seeing, lighthouse, magnificent beaches, see Eagles Rock. Lots of cafes and restaurants. Around $70+ per night, Bit expensive compared to other parks we have stayed in other big 4 were $45 per night. 11 min back to Anglesea, 22 min to Apolla bay. Lovely quiet park in Early December

We booked for a 4d/3n stay at Big 4.  It was in a great location, across the road from a general store, pharmacy, post office, a few cafes and a gift store.  Walking distance to the lighthouse.  Our car broke down while there, RACV organised tow truck to a mechanic in Anglesea and Big 4 were able to accommodate us for an extra 4 days stay. Definitely recommend.
Good location and the staff were very helpful
Very disgusting hair everywhere wasn’t cleaned and so much spiders

We've stayed at Big 4 Aireys Inlet a few times now and haven't been disappointed yet. The staff are great and the amenities well maintained. Tent sites are generous and the new dog friendly cabins are awesome - they have built enclosed paved yards for the dogs to enjoy some outdoors time without having to be on lead all the time. Brilliant! If taking dogs, just remember to check conditions as there are some busy times of the year that may be restricted. Overall, one of our favourite places to stay with our dogs. Recommended.

We had a great time at Airys Inlet Big 4, a small peaceful holiday park that has everything  you could want, close to the Great Ocean rd and everything that has to offer. We had a great 7 nights thanks for the wonderful stay! Staff were lovely too!

First time at this site and we loved it. Friendly staff and even a late check out. Nice and quite site and we loved it and loads to do all around the place.  Excellent.

Why does so many other sites kick you out at 10 am when nobody comes in until the afternoon? Not as if they need to clean the site.

A great little caravan park set in a beautiful setting among the trees. Reception was very friendly and helpful, coffee van there all the time. Easy walk to shops on both top and bottom streets. And beautiful restaurants close by.
Bed was super uncomfortable and the room wasn't clean
Stayed in a two bed cabin. Very comfortable and clean. Nice caravan park and friendly staff.
Fantastic caravan park, great location, helpful friendly staff.

Your family bathroom made my day! After spending some cold day's in a van without a working heater and sleeping like on bricks I took a bath on my birthday and felt amazing.
Also nice staff 👍

Fantastic caravan park
Very clean and well maintained
Outstanding staff

Such a nice park, safe for kids and very clean. We had booked an ensuite camp site and the ensuite was so clean and well maintained. Everyone was so friendly and Mellissa at the reception was amazing. She was more than happy to accommodate our requests. We have already booked another trip with them and this park will definitely be one of those where we would keep visiting.
Very neat cabin, cosy and well appointed. You could stay a while here and feel very comfortable.
Amazing service, clean facilities, stayed here several times and every time is amazing, staff are very helpful and happy to help. 10/10
Best Place along the Great Ocean Road! Great service! Excellent for families! The cabin with the spa bath was amazing! This is the best place I've stayed at!
Clean and comfortable with a coffee cart, communal fire pit and culinary delights all within walking distance. Friendly team!
Loved our camping stay. Peaceful stay.
